context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements the Payment Intents API (not the legacy Charges API), loads Stripe.js from CDN, uses automatic_payment_methods, attaches order metadata, converts dollar amounts to cents, returns the client secret, and confirms payment with the correct return_url.

checklist.name: stripe npm package
checklist.description: Server-side code uses the 'stripe' npm package (import/require of 'stripe'), not any other payment library

checklist.name: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY from env
checklist.description: Stripe client is initialised with process.env.STRIPE_SECRET_KEY (not a hardcoded key)

checklist.name: Stripe.js loaded from CDN
checklist.description: The HTML file loads Stripe.js via a <script> tag pointing to https://js.stripe.com/v3/ rather than bundling it locally

checklist.name: Payment Intents API used
checklist.description: Uses stripe.paymentIntents.create() — does NOT use the legacy stripe.charges.create()

checklist.name: automatic_payment_methods enabled
checklist.description: Payment Intent is created with automatic_payment_methods: { enabled: true }

checklist.name: order_id in metadata
checklist.description: Payment Intent creation includes a metadata object containing an order_id field populated from the request

checklist.name: Amount converted to cents
checklist.description: Dollar amount from the request is multiplied by 100 (or equivalent conversion) before being passed as the amount to paymentIntents.create()

checklist.name: clientSecret returned
checklist.description: The API endpoint returns the paymentIntent.client_secret value to the client (e.g. res.json({ clientSecret: paymentIntent.client_secret }))

checklist.name: confirmPayment return_url
checklist.description: Client-side code calls stripe.confirmPayment() with a confirmParams.return_url that points to an order confirmation path (e.g. /order/confirmation)

checklist.name: Error handling on client
checklist.description: Client-side code checks for an error in the result of confirmPayment and displays it to the user rather than silently failing

checklist.name: No raw card data
checklist.description: Code does NOT read or transmit raw card numbers directly — uses Stripe Elements for card input
